---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for MCS
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: type:enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the improvement it would
bring. Why is this valuable for MCS?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. If you have a concrete design
in mind, sketch it out here.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why you
ruled them out.

## Affected crates

List which MCS crates this would touch (e.g. `mcs-core`, `mcs-api`).

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or prior art that is relevant.
